## Type of PR

- [ ] Test PR (step 4 of the AI-DLC loop)

## Pre-review Checklist

- [ ] Tests cover the Acceptance Criteria only (no extra scope)
- [ ] All tests pass
- [ ] Lint/format is clean
- [ ] Code is reusable and reused code is covered by tests
- [ ] No secrets committed
- [ ] PR is reasonably sized for human review; split into tickets if not
- [ ] Description links to the related issue and AC
